chet holmgren.detail: Played 24 minutes in Game 6, down from 30 minutes in Game 5; no explicit injury noted but reduced from prior game

de'aaron fox.detail: Playing through a known ankle injury since the previous series; limited to 26 minutes in a blowout win
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox has been battling an ankle injury since Game 4 of the Western Conference Semifinals against Minnesota. He shot 1-9 from the field for just 5 points in 26 minutes, with the blowout win (118-91) and the lingering ankle issue both contributing to his limited production and minutes.

devin vassell.detail: 26 minutes played in a blowout win; no injury flags found
devin vassell.web_narrative: Vassell grabbed only 1 rebound in 26 minutes, falling well short of the over 4 line. No injury or restriction context was found; the miss appears to be a simple low-rebound game in a blowout.

dylan harper.detail: 22 minutes played in a blowout win with strong performance; no flags

isaiah hartenstein.detail: Played only 16 minutes in Game 6, down sharply from 31 minutes in Game 5; likely reduced due to blowout or foul trouble
isaiah hartenstein.web_narrative: Hartenstein was limited to just 16 minutes in Game 6 compared to 31 in Game 5, likely due to the lopsided 118-91 final score reducing his playing time. He finished with 5 rebounds, just short of the over 6 line, with his reduced minutes the primary driver of the miss.

jalen williams.detail: Listed as questionable with left hamstring injury management/strain; played only 10 minutes in Game 6
jalen williams.web_narrative: Williams was officially listed as questionable for Game 6 with a left hamstring injury management/strain and was clearly on a minutes restriction, logging just 10 minutes. stephon castle.detail: Played 32 minutes in a blowout win; Brave search references a hand injury from an earlier series game, not this contest
stephon castle.web_narrative: Castle went 0-for on three-pointers in Game 6 despite shooting 3-5 from three in Game 5. No injury context was found for this specific game; the miss appears to be cold three-point shooting in a game San Antonio won comfortably.
